name: read_file
description: Read a text file from the workspace.

name: list_files
description: List files and directories at a path.

name: run_command
description: Execute a shell command and return its output.

name: write_file
description: Create or overwrite a file with the given content.

name: skill
description: Load a named skill's full instructions into context. Call this BEFORE doing the task whenever a skill in <available_skills> matches the user's request. The skill body returned will tell you how to proceed.

name.description: The name of the skill to load (must match a name in <available_skills>)
